texto: Innate mechanisms endow the visual system with highly specific connections, but visual experience early in life is necessary for their maintenance and full development. Deprivation experiments demonstrate that neural connections can be modulated by environmental influences during a critical period of postnatal development.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Torsten Wiesel sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Innate mechanisms endow the visual system with highly specific connections, but visual experience…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, experience, visual, útil em momentos de natal e termino.

texto: Science is not an intelligence test. Intuition is important, knowing what kind of questions to ask. The other thing is a passion for getting to the core of the problem.
explicacao: Citação de Torsten Wiesel sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Science is not an intelligence test. Intuition is important, knowing what kind of questions to as…” articula inteligencia, curiosity, openness em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como openness e questions.

texto: It takes a long time for a country to build a strong base in science, but only a short time to destroy it. Germany was a sad example. It was a world leader in the sciences for more than a century, until its science base was demolished during the Nazi era, and the country ceded its position to the United States.
